text.title: Use Case Mapping Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure for applying Use Case Mapping. Each step lists input, action, and output. Pause and surface the artefact when output is produced.

step.name: name-actor-and-goal
step.action: Pin primary actor and goal in active-verb form.

step.name: draft-main-flow
step.action: Number steps 1..N with one observable action per step.

step.name: branch-alternative-flows
step.action: Add ≥1 alt flow per error/edge/abort path.

step.name: lock-postcondition
step.action: State observable end state for each terminal branch.

decision-gate.p: After the final step, the artefact MUST satisfy the output contract in content/02-output-contract.xml before downstream consumers read it.
